publicScreens.label: Home
publicScreens.purpose: Introduce the magazine and route readers to lead stories, latest articles, categories, media, and people.

publicScreens.label: About
publicScreens.purpose: Explain mission, vision, and organizational overview.

publicScreens.label: Creative Team
publicScreens.purpose: Show the core team with roles, bios, images, and social links.

publicScreens.label: Contributors
publicScreens.purpose: Show contributor profiles and connect readers to published works.

publicScreens.label: Visceral Mag / Articles
publicScreens.purpose: Provide the main article archive, category entry points, and latest editorial content.

publicScreens.label: Article Detail
publicScreens.purpose: Provide a focused reading page with metadata, rich content, related articles, comments, and reviews.

publicScreens.label: Categories / Search
publicScreens.purpose: Help readers browse by category and search by keyword.

publicScreens.label: Featured / Media
publicScreens.purpose: Show photography, artwork, media stories, captions, credits, and alt text.

publicScreens.label: Contact
publicScreens.purpose: Capture reader, contributor, and business inquiries.

adminScreens.label: Admin Dashboard
adminScreens.purpose: Show publishing health, pending work, recent activity, and fast actions.

adminScreens.label: Article Management
adminScreens.purpose: Create, edit, draft, publish, delete, and manage SEO for articles.

adminScreens.label: Profile / Media Management
adminScreens.purpose: Manage contributors, creative team profiles, and media library metadata.

adminScreens.label: Comments / Reviews Moderation
adminScreens.purpose: Approve, reject, delete, search, and filter comments and reviews.

adminScreens.label: Contact Submissions
adminScreens.purpose: Review and manage contact form submissions.
